commentPlaceholder: Ask a question or share a tip
commentSignIn: Sign in with GitHub to join the discussion
myPluginsIntro: Plugins published under scopes you own. Code and versions come from the published package.
createIntroBefore: Reserve a name in one of your scopes and set up trusted publishing. The plugin stays
createIntroAfter: and hidden from the store until your first version is published from CI or the CLI.
stepScopeHint: Choose which of your scopes will own this plugin. Only scopes you administer are shown.
stepNameHint: Lowercase letters, numbers and dashes. This becomes the permanent install id.
stepPublisherHint: Authorize a CI repo and workflow now so your first publish works with no token (OIDC). You can also set this up later from the plugin page.
azureComingSoon: Azure trusted publishing is coming soon. Use GitHub or GitLab for tokenless publishing today.
reserveSummaryAfter: and stay out of the public store until your first publish.
noScopeDescription: A plugin must live under a scope you administer. Claim one to get started.
verifiedScopedPlugins: {count, plural, one {# verified, scoped plugin} other {# verified, scoped plugins}}
viewerEmptyTitle: Select a file to view its contents
viewerEmptyDescription: Source is read straight from the published tarball.
reasonBinary: This is a built or binary file.
fileListFailed: Could not load the file list.
filesAssurance: Exactly these files are installed, nothing else runs.
noPluginsMatchDescription: Try a different name, package, or status.
reviewSignIn: Sign in with GitHub to write a review
reviewBodyPlaceholder: Share how this plugin works for you
noReviews: No reviews yet. Be the first to review.
helpfulCount: {count, plural, one {# found this helpful} other {# found this helpful}}
